Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Fossil Fun

bonuses: Battle (Raids): An additional 5,000 XP for completing raids
Battle (Team GO Rocket): Extra Mysterious Components from Team GO Rocket Grunts
Catch (Candy): Additional Candy for catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better
Catch (XP): 1.5× XP for catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better
Explore (Hatch): 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance bonus
Explore (PokéStops): 5× XP for spinning PokéStops

Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Hoothoot during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On June 22, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Hoothoot.
- Hoothoot

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Pidove during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On June 29, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Pidove.
- Pidove

GO Battle League.title: Master League: Mega Edition and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League: Mega Edition and Sunshine Cup: Great League Edition will run from June 16, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to June 23, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Fire-, Grass-, and Ground-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Charizard

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from June 23, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to June 30, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

Raid Battles.title: Necrozma in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Necrozma will be in five-star raid battles from June 17, 2026 to June 23, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Necrozma from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- June 17

Raid Battles.title: Mega Scizor in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Scizor will be in Mega Raids from June 17, 2026 at 6 am to June 24, 2026 at 6 am local time.

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Dialga in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Dialga will appear in Pokemon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Dialga!
Shadow Dialga will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from June 2 to June 30.

Raid Battles.title: Celesteela and Kartana in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Celesteela and Kartana will be in five-star raid battles from June 24, 2026 to June 30, 2026.
- Celesteela will appear in the Southern Hemisphere.
- Kartana will appear in the Northern Hemisphere.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring these Pokemon from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- June 24
These Pokemon will remain in their respective regions.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Pidgeot in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Pidgeot will be in Mega Raids from June 24, 2026 at 6 am to July 1, 2026 at 6 am local time.

Raid Hour.title: Celesteela and Kartana Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description:
A Raid Hour featuring Celesteela and Kartana is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.
- Celesteela is currently only available in the Southern Hemisphere.
- Kartana is currently only available in the Northern Hemisphere.

Earn more Stardust from defeating Team GO Rocket Grunts and Leaders

Event.description:
Take flight as Squawkabilly makes its Pokémon GO debut!
The Flying Taxi event will take place from June 23, 2026 at 10 am to June 29, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Flying Taxi: Taken Over

bonuses: 2× Catch Candy
Earn more Stardust from defeating Team GO Rocket Grunts and Leaders
Pokémon caught via one-star and three-star Shadow Raids during the event will have a wider variance of Attack, Defense, and HP
Team GO Rocket will appear more frequently at PokéStops and in balloons*
You can use a Charged TM to help a Shadow Pokémon forget the Charged Attack Frustration

Event.description:
Rescue Shadow Reshiram and more during Flying Taxi: Taken Over!
The Flying Taxi: Taken Over event will take place from June 25, 2026 at 12 am to June 29, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: 10th Anniversary Party

bonuses: 4× Stardust for catching Pokémon.
4× XP for catching Pokémon.
Event-themed Pokémon appearing in the wild are more likely to be Shiny.
Gimmighoul holding a 10th anniversary coin may have a Special Background!
When you use a Coin Bag during this event, you may encounter Shiny Gimmighoul—if you’re lucky!

Event.description:
Celebrate a decade of Pokémon GO together during the 10th Anniversary Party!
The 10th Anniversary Party event will take place from July 4, 2026 at 10 am to July 6, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Road of Legends

bonuses: No Remote Raid Pass limit Monday, July 6, to Sunday, July 12, 2026
Party Power charges faster in raids
Premier Balls will be more effective at catching Pokémon after raids
Receive special stickers from spinning PokéStops and opening Gifts
Trainers level 31 and up are guaranteed to receive Candy XL for trading Pokémon
Up to 2 free Raid Passes from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Event.description: The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global starts here! During the Road of Legends, Trainers around the world can gear up for the big weekend with a full week of powerful raid encounters, event bonuses, and GO Pass rewards. Whether you’re looking to strengthen your team, stock up on rewards, or take on some of Pokémon GO’s most formidable foes, this is your chance to get ready for the adventure ahead.

Event.title: Weekend Event
Event.description: The Weekend Event event will take place on July 18, 2026 from 10 am to 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Hatch Day
Event.description: The Hatch Day event will take place on August 8, 2026 from 11 am to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Example Event Template (Auto ToC Demo)
Event.description:
This file demonstrates the reusable event pattern:
- Keep all section if blocks in the template body.
- Set event_toc_auto: true.
- Fill data lists only for sections you want to show.
- Leave unused section data empty to auto-hide both section and ToC item.

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: June

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Trainers level 31 and above will receive one guaranteed Candy XL when trading Pokémon

GO Pass.description:
Lugia and the Timed Incubator return for GO Pass: June!
From Tuesday, June 2, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, July 7, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for June will be available in Pokémon GO!

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global

bonuses: 1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
Branching Timed Research with a choice between Mega Mewtwo X or Mega Mewtwo Y
Different Pokémon type-themed Field Research every hour
Global Challenges to unlock additional bonuses and Ultra Unlock events
Incense (excluding Daily Adventure Incense) will attract special Pokémon
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Lure Modules activated during the event will last for one hour
Open up to 50 Gifts each day
Party Play will be active for nine hours
Special Research including an encounter with Zeraora
Up to nine free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to six Special Trades each day
spawns: Pikachu wearing a Team Instinct hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Mystic hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Valor hat
shiny: Pikachu wearing a Team Instinct hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Mystic hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Valor hat

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global! This worldwide event takes place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 7 pm local time.
For the first time, GO Fest: Global is free for all Trainers who log in during event weekend. Everyone can access the featured Special Research, event bonuses, and increased Shiny encounter opportunities at no cost.

Season.title: Forever Forward

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Forever Forward!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
